title: Communication Preferences and Consent Record
disclaimer: Technical communication preference record — not a legal determination.
warningBanner: Marketing consent is separate from appointment, clinical follow-up, security, and mandatory service communications. Record the patient's statement and the notice version used accurately.

help.unknownNotConsent: "Unknown" is not consent — it means no explicit recorded preference exists.
help.deniedVsWithdrawn: "Denied" and "Withdrawn" are different historical states: withdrawn means a previously recorded authorization was later withdrawn.
help.notRequiredMeaning: "Not Required" is a technical policy exception (e.g. transactional/legal notice) — not a general marketing authorization.

conflict.modalNote: A stale legacy restrictive signal (e.g. SMS opt-out) disagrees with an explicit central "granted" record for this cell. Sending is blocked. Choosing "Deny" or "Withdraw" below does NOT resolve this conflict — it only accepts the restrictive legacy signal, permanently recording a new central consent event that brings the central record into agreement with it; this does NOT prove the legacy signal was correct. If you believe the legacy signal itself is stale, use the link below to record a separate correction — that action does not itself grant consent and does not change the central preference.
conflict.correctLegacyAction: Correct Legacy SMS Opt-out / Mark as Stale

legacySignals.title: Legacy Signal
legacySignals.disclaimer: These are legacy (pre-migration) fields and do NOT reflect the current consent status. The central preference matrix above is the current, authoritative source.
legacySignals.notCentralConsent: This value is not the central communication consent.

export.explanation: Export downloads the current preference state and full history for this patient as JSON. Secret/internal-only fields (e.g. raw IP/UA hashes) are never included.

confirm.grantBody: You are confirming that the patient gave explicit consent for this channel and purpose. Please record the evidence type and the notice version used accurately.
confirm.denyBody: This channel and purpose will be marked so that sending is denied.
confirm.withdrawBody: Any previously granted consent will be withdrawn and sending will be blocked from this point forward.
confirm.resetBody: This resets the current decision only; history is never deleted — a new 'unknown' state is simply recorded.

fields.noticeVersionRequiredHint: Required for a grant recorded from this source.
fields.notesPlaceholder: Brief note on the patient's statement (optional)
fields.notesRequiredPlaceholder: Describe what the staff member said/showed (required)
fields.notesRequiredHint: A brief description of what was said/shown is required for a staff-recorded grant.

errors.genericSave: Could not save this change. Please try again.
errors.scope_denied: You do not have access to this patient.
errors.evidence_required: An evidence type is required for this action.
errors.unsafe_note: The note was rejected because it contains disallowed content.
errors.concurrent_update: This record was updated concurrently. Please try again.
errors.validationSummary: {{count}} fields are missing or invalid. Please check the highlighted fields.

legacyCorrection.title: Correct Legacy SMS Opt-out
legacyCorrection.warning: Use this only when the legacy smsOptOut value is demonstrably stale or incorrect. This action does NOT itself grant consent — the central communication preference is left unchanged. A reason, evidence type, and notes are required; the action is permanently recorded.

fields.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this legacy signal is stale/incorrect (required)
fields.notesPlaceholder: Explain the evidence that the legacy signal is stale (required)
fields.notesRequiredHint: Staff notes explaining why the old signal is considered stale are required.

legacyCorrection.success: The legacy SMS opt-out signal was corrected successfully.

errors.legacy_signal_not_present: There is no active legacy SMS opt-out record for this patient to correct.
errors.legacy_signal_already_corrected: This legacy record was already corrected.
errors.stale_legacy_signal_state: This record changed via another request. Please refresh and try again.
errors.unsafe_note: This text was rejected because it contains disallowed content.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.clinic_scope_mismatch: You do not have access to this patient.
errors.idempotency_conflict: This request was already submitted with different content. Please refresh.
errors.generic: Could not save this correction. Please try again.
